tickets.notes: gates passed: go-vet,go-test,race; Created falloc.go (!linux) and falloc_linux.go (linux) using build tags because syscall.Fallocate is not available on Darwin. falloc_test.go with 5 tests: name, set size, zero size, read-only file, fallback correctness.
tickets.title: internal/disk/falloc.go: falloc allocator (per-OS fallocate)

tickets.notes: gates passed: go-vet,go-test,race; 10/10 tests pass. Uses private wrappedDiskError with Is/As methods to support errors.Is(sentinel) matching, since core.Error does not implement Is. Wrap maps ENOSPC→ErrDiskFull, EIO→ErrWriteError/ErrReadError, EINVAL→ErrInvalidOffset, EBADF→ErrFileClosed. IsDiskFull uses errors.Is against syscall.ENOSPC.
tickets.title: internal/disk/errors.go: disk-specific errors

tickets.notes: Adaptor{OpenForWrite,WriteAt,ReadAt,Size,Sync,Close}. BT piece methods: SetPieceCount,MarkPiece,Have,Bitfield,Missing. FileEntry{Name,Length,Offset}.
tickets.title: internal/disk/adaptor.go: Adaptor interface + FileEntry type

tickets.notes: SingleFile wraps one os.File. Implements Adaptor. Piece tracking via internal []bool bitfield.
tickets.title: internal/disk/single_file.go: SingleFile adaptor

tickets.notes: gates passed: go-vet,go-test,race; 23 tests covering: NewMultiFile validation, OpenForWrite (dir creation, subdirs, idempotency, after-close), WriteAt (single-file, cross-boundary, invalid offset, empty buffer), ReadAt (single-file, across-boundary, EOF, beyond-size, gap-zero-fill, partial file, empty buffer), Close (idempotent, operations-after-close), Sync, piece tracking (SetPieceCount, MarkPiece, Have, Bitfield MSB-first, Missing, reinit), zero-length files, double-write+read [auto-promoted]
tickets.title: internal/disk/multi_file.go: MultiFile adaptor with piece boundaries

tickets.notes: gates passed: go-vet,go-test,race; 15 tests pass. Implemented pieceMap with RWMutex-protected setCount/mark/have/count/bitfield/missing. MSB-first bitfield encoding. Bounds-safe: out-of-range indices are no-ops. mark(i,false) is idempotent. Zero-count safe.
tickets.title: internal/disk/piece_map.go: piece state, bitfield, missing pieces

tickets.notes: Spec resolved; verifier with Verify(ctx) implemented; gates passed: go-vet,go-test,race
